query: Find 10 buildings in Drammen municipality that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.

Storm-surge and sea-level-rise hazard data showing coastal inundation areas for different return periods and future sea-level scenarios. Useful for coastal flood exposure analysis and scenario-based hazard assessment.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Flood zone data showing inundation areas for specific flood return periods such as 20-year, 200-year, and 1000-year flood scenarios. Useful for scenario-based flood analysis and flood-risk filtering.

1.description: Fetch Drammen municipality boundary to use as spatial filter

2.description: Fetch 200-year flood zones intersecting Drammen municipality

4.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard zones intersecting Drammen municipality

5.description: Filter buildings intersecting 200-year flood zones (step 2 and step 3)

6.description: Calculate distance from each building to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone (step 5 and step 4)

7.description: Sort buildings by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending

9.description: Select only building identifiers, geometry, and distance to quick-clay hazard zone
